beginner_flow_contract.beginner_language: You are at the research stage; the packet prepares questions and evidence before buyer, broker, or reviewer action.
beginner_flow_contract.proof_boundary: No-document flow can prepare a starter packet, but it cannot prove market demand, source freshness, or trade readiness.

blocked_claim_policy: Business logic prepares decisions; it never approves import/export, tariff, buyer, supplier, shipment, compliance, legal, or market-demand claims.

business_identity_lock.one_sentence_promise: Trade Readiness Copilot helps exporters prepare evidence-backed buyer and broker packets for selling into Canada, showing missing documents, official-source checks, blocked claims, and next safe actions.

buyer_evidence_ladder.allowed_language: buyer replied on a dated channel
buyer_evidence_ladder.label: reply_received

buyer_evidence_ladder.allowed_language: buyer meeting completed and notes attached
buyer_evidence_ladder.label: meeting_completed

buyer_evidence_ladder.allowed_language: letter of intent or equivalent evidence attached
buyer_evidence_ladder.label: loi_received

buyer_evidence_ladder.allowed_language: purchase order or paid order evidence attached
buyer_evidence_ladder.label: po_or_paid_order

buyer_supplier_validation_contract.proof_boundary: The product records evidence levels; it does not validate buyers or verify suppliers.

completion_phase_contracts.completion_definition_controlled_private: A foreign exporter selling into Canada can enter product and country details, with or without documents, and receive a packet with market research requirements, missing evidence, official source routes, responsibility gaps, blocked claims, buyer/broker/supplier questions, and next safe move.
completion_phase_contracts.completion_definition_public_launch: Public launch requires locked logic, beta outcomes, hosted controls, expert reviews, reviewed public claims, and named launch-owner approval.

controls.minimum: no demo users; real identity provider or hardened passwordless auth
secure cookies, CSRF, short expiry, organization isolation
extension/MIME allowlist, malware scan, storage isolation, no direct serving, rate limits
privacy notice, AI-use notice, retention/deletion controls, breach process
no-AI/manual mode, metadata-only mode, redaction preview, provider inventory
upload, review, export, and deletion logs
health checks, error logging, security events

hosted_beta_control_contract.payment_policy: payments remain downstream; live checkout stays disabled until scope, support, refund, tax, webhook, and claim-boundary reviews pass
hosted_beta_control_contract.storage_recommendation: managed Postgres plus object storage for hosted beta; local SQLite and filesystem remain dev/local only

metadata_only_beta_contract.phase_policy: private beta phase 1 uses metadata-only packets plus optional sample or redacted documents
metadata_only_beta_contract.proof_boundary: This contract prepares beta measurement; it does not create real beta outcomes.
required_observations: whether users would use, share, or pay for the packet
whether users understand blocked versus approved language

minimum_input_checks.label: intended use
minimum_input_checks.value: Assess whether this source packet is ready for internal importer/source-readiness review.

beginner_flow.next_valid_move: Generate a starter packet with blocked claims and questions.
beginner_flow.proof_boundary: Starter flow prepares a research packet only; it never proves market demand, source freshness, or trade readiness.

formula_contract.buyer_supplier_evidence_score: weighted buyer ladder and supplier evidence ladder; cap at 59 until dated direct buyer evidence, supplier evidence, and reviewer checks exist
formula_contract.decision_safety_score: minimum of blocker gate state and weighted composite of the other scores; cap at 39 while P0 shipment/compliance blockers are open
formula_contract.evidence_completeness_score: weighted completion of identity, route, parties, docs, source evidence, and review statuses; cap at 49 if core fields or evidence are missing
formula_contract.market_signal_score: 100*(0.25*demand_trend + 0.20*market_size + 0.20*import_dependency + 0.15*competitor_gap + 0.10*lead_signal + 0.10*access_factor); cap at 59 until official datasets are attached
formula_contract.responsibility_clarity_score: weighted by importer of record, Incoterms, buyer/importer identity, role split, and broker path; cap at 39 if importer of record or Incoterms are unknown
formula_contract.source_freshness_score: weighted by source age, cadence, and diff review; zero if a critical source changed and review is pending

score_policy.green: internally usable only when evidence and review are sufficient for the local scope

buyer_supplier_evidence_score.cap_reason: Capped because evidence levels do not equal buyer validation, supplier verification, or market demand proof.
buyer_supplier_evidence_score.meaning: Buyer level -1 and supplier level 0 are recorded without validation/verification claims.
buyer_supplier_evidence_score.next_valid_move: Collect dated buyer interaction and supplier evidence, then route to review.

decision_safety_score.cap_reason: Capped because open blocker rows and external gates prevent approval-style decisions.
decision_safety_score.meaning: 7 blocker rows keep external decisions closed.
decision_safety_score.next_valid_move: Refresh official sources and keep claims reference-only until qualified review.

evidence_completeness_score.cap_reason: Capped because the packet still has missing required evidence or review fields.
evidence_completeness_score.meaning: 3 evidence rows attached and 10 required items missing.
evidence_completeness_score.next_valid_move: Attach missing product, commercial, origin, review, buyer, and source evidence.

market_signal_score.cap_reason: Capped at 59 because official trade dataset rows, access comparison, and direct buyer evidence are not all attached and reviewed.
market_signal_score.meaning: Local market signal score is 55/100 before external demand, dataset, and buyer proof.
market_signal_score.next_valid_move: Attach dated trade dataset rows, market-access comparison, and buyer/operator validation before treating the signal as a decision.

responsibility_clarity_score.cap_reason: Capped because importer of record, Incoterms, or role split are not confirmed enough for external decisions.
responsibility_clarity_score.meaning: Confirm importer of record and Incoterms before shipment or buyer claims.
responsibility_clarity_score.next_valid_move: Confirm importer of record, Incoterms, buyer/importer role, and broker review path.

source_freshness_score.cap_reason: Capped because routed official sources are not the same as current, reviewed source proof.
source_freshness_score.meaning: Official/reference sources are routed, but current-source proof and qualified review are still required.
source_freshness_score.next_valid_move: Run dated source refresh and record hash/change classification.

buyer.next_valid_move: Collect dated buyer reply, call notes, LOI, PO, or paid-order evidence.

buyer_supplier_evidence.proof_boundary: The product records evidence levels; it does not validate buyers or verify suppliers.

supplier.next_valid_move: Collect registration, export ability, product documents, inspection/certificate, and prior-shipment evidence.

data_requirements: destination import value and quantity by HS/product
top origin countries and unit values
possible importer or buyer lead source

decision_support_policy.safe_statement_template: This appears worth deeper research because a named source shows a signal, but buyer demand is not validated until direct buyer evidence exists.

safe_interpretations: high imports plus growing trend means potential demand worth validating
high imports plus few source countries means possible supplier-diversification research
high imports plus high tariffs means market exists but access cost may be difficult
low imports plus high restrictions means niche, restricted, or unattractive until proven otherwise

next_required_evidence: qualified reviewer note before external market claims

broker_or_expert: Who is the Canadian importer of record for this shipment?
Which Incoterms or delivery responsibility applies?
What HS/tariff classification should a qualified reviewer use for the product?
Does the product need CFIA/AIRS, import permit, controlled goods, sanctions, or restricted-party review?
Which product specs, invoice/proforma, packing list, certificate, proof-of-origin, and contract documents are still missing?
Can the Canadian buyer or broker confirm the next valid evidence to collect?
buyer_or_importer: Who is the Canadian importer of record for this shipment?
Which Incoterms or delivery responsibility applies?
What HS/tariff classification should a qualified reviewer use for the product?
Does the product need CFIA/AIRS, import permit, controlled goods, sanctions, or restricted-party review?

formula_contract.buyer_supplier_evidence_score: weighted buyer ladder and supplier evidence ladder; cap at 59 until dated direct buyer evidence, supplier evidence, and reviewer checks exist
formula_contract.decision_safety_score: minimum of blocker gate state and weighted composite of the other scores; cap at 39 while P0 shipment/compliance blockers are open
formula_contract.evidence_completeness_score: weighted completion of identity, route, parties, docs, source evidence, and review statuses; cap at 49 if core fields or evidence are missing
formula_contract.market_signal_score: 100*(0.25*demand_trend + 0.20*market_size + 0.20*import_dependency + 0.15*competitor_gap + 0.10*lead_signal + 0.10*access_factor); cap at 59 until official datasets are attached
formula_contract.responsibility_clarity_score: weighted by importer of record, Incoterms, buyer/importer identity, role split, and broker path; cap at 39 if importer of record or Incoterms are unknown
formula_contract.source_freshness_score: weighted by source age, cadence, and diff review; zero if a critical source changed and review is pending

score_policy.green: internally usable only when evidence and review are sufficient for the local scope

buyer_supplier_evidence_score.cap_reason: Capped because evidence levels do not equal buyer validation, supplier verification, or market demand proof.
buyer_supplier_evidence_score.meaning: Buyer level -1 and supplier level -1 are recorded without validation/verification claims.
buyer_supplier_evidence_score.next_valid_move: Collect dated buyer interaction and supplier evidence, then route to review.

decision_safety_score.cap_reason: Capped because open blocker rows and external gates prevent approval-style decisions.
decision_safety_score.meaning: 16 blocker rows keep external decisions closed.
decision_safety_score.next_valid_move: Attach evidence and record freshness/rights metadata.

evidence_completeness_score.cap_reason: Capped because the packet still has missing required evidence or review fields.
evidence_completeness_score.meaning: 1 evidence rows attached and 12 required items missing.
evidence_completeness_score.next_valid_move: Attach missing product, commercial, origin, review, buyer, and source evidence.

market_signal_score.cap_reason: Capped at 59 because official trade dataset rows, access comparison, and direct buyer evidence are not all attached and reviewed.
market_signal_score.meaning: Local market signal score is 45/100 before external demand, dataset, and buyer proof.
market_signal_score.next_valid_move: Attach dated trade dataset rows, market-access comparison, and buyer/operator validation before treating the signal as a decision.

responsibility_clarity_score.cap_reason: Capped because importer of record, Incoterms, or role split are not confirmed enough for external decisions.
responsibility_clarity_score.meaning: Confirm importer of record and Incoterms before shipment or buyer claims.
responsibility_clarity_score.next_valid_move: Confirm importer of record, Incoterms, buyer/importer role, and broker review path.

source_freshness_score.cap_reason: Capped because routed official sources are not the same as current, reviewed source proof.
source_freshness_score.meaning: Official/reference sources are routed, but current-source proof and qualified review are still required.
source_freshness_score.next_valid_move: Run dated source refresh and record hash/change classification.

buyer.next_valid_move: Collect dated buyer reply, call notes, LOI, PO, or paid-order evidence.

buyer_supplier_evidence.proof_boundary: The product records evidence levels; it does not validate buyers or verify suppliers.

supplier.next_valid_move: Collect registration, export ability, product documents, inspection/certificate, and prior-shipment evidence.

decision_support_policy.safe_statement_template: This appears worth deeper research because a named source shows a signal, but buyer demand is not validated until direct buyer evidence exists.

safe_interpretations: high imports plus growing trend means potential demand worth validating
high imports plus few source countries means possible supplier-diversification research
high imports plus high tariffs means market exists but access cost may be difficult
low imports plus high restrictions means niche, restricted, or unattractive until proven otherwise

broker_or_expert: Who is the Canadian importer of record for this shipment?

payment_pricing_contract.paid_scope: prepared trade readiness packet and evidence organization
payment_pricing_contract.recommended_model: free starter plus paid prepared packet or review-preparation package

phases.local_completion_surface: 12 decision questions, canonical packet stage, six scores, provenance, blocked claims, and allowed/blocked local actions
phases.name: Business logic runtime

phases.local_completion_surface: starter input checks, source-route prompts, starter packet output, buyer packet draft, and no-send outreach policy
phases.name: No-document beginner flow

phases.local_completion_surface: bounded market signal, importer/buyer discovery routes, tariff/market-access comparison routes, and demand-claim blocks
phases.name: Market intelligence

phases.local_completion_surface: Canada, origin-country, India strategic, and Generic fallback route checks with country-specific claim gates
phases.name: Country packs

phases.local_completion_surface: registered source rows, refresh cadence, stale-source impact rules, evidence freshness evaluation, and current-source claim blocks
phases.name: Source monitoring

phases.local_completion_surface: starter, exporter, importer, operator, supplier, buyer/broker, expert, missing-evidence, and blocked-claim outputs
phases.name: Packet outputs

phases.local_completion_surface: review lanes, scope templates, decision values, required evidence fields, and no-reviewer-no-claim rule
phases.name: Human review gates

phases.local_completion_surface: metadata-only beta scope, outcome capture requirements, and real-user evidence gate
phases.name: Metadata-only beta

phases.local_completion_surface: hosted auth, database, storage, audit, backup, AI routing, observability, and payment gate checklist
phases.name: Hosted beta infrastructure

phases.local_completion_surface: controlled real-file beta scope, upload consent, AI-use consent, redaction, deletion, and audit requirements
phases.name: Controlled real-file beta

phases.local_completion_surface: buyer and supplier evidence ladders, safe allowed language, and validation/verification claim blocks
phases.name: Buyer/supplier evidence

phases.local_completion_surface: paid scope, forbidden paid scope, pricing/review prerequisites, and live-checkout-disabled gate
phases.name: Payments

phases.local_completion_surface: safe initial public scope, blocked public scope, approval prerequisites, and public-launch-ready false
phases.name: Public launch

proof_boundary: This business logic is generated from local packet/evidence/source state. External market datasets, buyer/supplier validation, source freshness, and qualified reviews remain evidence gates.

real_file_beta_contract.proof_boundary: Real-file beta requires hosted security, privacy, upload, and AI-safety review before use with sensitive documents.
real_file_beta_contract.starting_scope: 3-5 trusted users only after hosted upload/privacy/security controls pass

reviewer_signoff_framework.final_rule: no reviewer lane, no claim lane

lanes.must_approve: users understand flows, blockers, outputs, and non-approved claims
upload handling, auth, storage isolation, deletion, and audit
notices, consent, retention, deletion, data handling, and claim boundaries
model routing, redaction, manual fallback, and prompt-injection controls
staging proof, secrets, storage, monitoring, backup, and rollback
reference-only customs, tariff, CFIA, sanctions, and broker-language boundaries
shipment, forwarder, route, cost, and readiness-language boundaries
customer-facing report wording and uncertainty labels
checkout, webhooks, support, refunds, tax/account treatment
